1038990323.label: PL2700_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4

480832215.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_1

267416397.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1600_2
267416397.jp_real: シュウインも気を回せ
267416397.en_literal: Even the surroundings are on alert.

19850191.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1600_3
19850191.english: Wait for backup before you jump in!

11766518.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1700_3
11766518.english: I'll keep the heat off you!

975395448.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_enemy_break_reaction_B
975395448.jp_real: ダメージを蓄積させる

728057261.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_A
728057261.jp_real: ジンジョウデワナイテキダ

834917859.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
834917859.en_literal: Ah, I should be on my guard.

833435492.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
833435492.en_literal: Maintain distance and deal with it.

1068447361.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_get_snp_3
1068447361.jp_real: こんなところにいたか
1068447361.english: Come here. There's a good boy.

836818514.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL2600_1
836818514.jp_real: よく見きった、ベアトリクス。

31797803.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_just_move_reaction_PL2600_3

604759225.label: PL2700_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
604759225.en_literal: Cool your head for a sec.

927405878.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_dark_1
927405878.jp_real: カオスデトネーション！

462653312.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_dark_2
462653312.jp_real: 奈落のフォールダウン！

746943836.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_earth_1
746943836.jp_real: アースデトネーション！

270664606.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_earth_3
270664606.jp_real: ディアストロフィズム！

983909266.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_fire_1
983909266.jp_real: レッドデトネーション！

920701893.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_fire_2
920701893.jp_real: ギレンのコラプション！

343942441.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_light_1
343942441.jp_real: アークデトネーション

566471912.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_light_2
566471912.jp_real: ライデンのエラディケート！

608878297.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_2chain
608878297.jp_real: まだまだ気は抜けないがな
608878297.en_literal: Still got some edge to you, huh?
608878297.english: Don't let up the heat just yet!

159042917.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain
159042917.english: Not bad. Not bad at all.

660493390.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish
660493390.jp_real: 危険だから下がっていろ
660493390.english: And why are you on the front lines?

104698.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish_2
104698.en_literal: It's got some weight to it.

274123353.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
274123353.jp_real: ああ、完璧な連携だった

693755676.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
693755676.jp_real: 覚悟の大きさが技を通して伝わってくるようだ
693755676.en_literal: Your resolve is coming through in your moves.
693755676.english: I take it you have a lot to fight for.

160480830.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
160480830.jp_real: この魔法の出力、侮れんな
160480830.english: Only a fool would underestimate your magic.

696174008.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
696174008.jp_real: 俺は平穏と静寂を望む
696174008.english: I dream of a world filled with peace and quiet.

431295249.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
431295249.jp_real: ペットたちも頑張っているな
431295249.en_literal: The pets are doing their best too.
431295249.english: What brave pets! I just can't...

609353523.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
609353523.jp_real: 涼しい顔してよくやる
609353523.english: Only a pro could do that with such poise.

1039141139.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
1039141139.jp_real: 敵を足止めしてくれて、助かった
1039141139.en_literal: Thanks for pinning that foe down.
1039141139.english: I owe you for holding down the front.

907750945.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
907750945.jp_real: その炎が、平穏をもたらすものであればいいがな。
907750945.en_literal: I hope that flame brings peace.
907750945.english: Are your flames capable of bringing peace and quiet?

208504120.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
208504120.jp_real: いつになく凄まじい斬撃に思えた
208504120.en_literal: It felt like an unprecedented, tremendous onslaught.

113233159.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
113233159.en_literal: Play with Fire. A little too bright?
113233159.english: I'll need to shield my eyes next time.

280060018.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
280060018.jp_real: ヨダルラーハ、目で追えないほどの動きよ。
280060018.english: You were a blur! My eyes couldn't even track you!

738459839.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
738459839.jp_real: まだモテあましているように見えるが
738459839.en_literal: You may look like you've got plenty to spare, but...
738459839.english: Our enemies still have some fight left.

668486951.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
668486951.english: Did he punch so fast it sparked flames?

24831010.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
24831010.jp_real: 作戦通りだ。次も行くぞ。
24831010.en_literal: It's going according to plan. Let's go for the next one!

83434201.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
83434201.jp_real: 作戦通りだ。次も行くぞ。
83434201.en_literal: It's going according to plan. Let's go for the next one.
83434201.english: We're go for the next phase!

811485875.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
811485875.jp_real: レンキンジツシ。そこが知れないな。
811485875.en_literal: Alchemist. I don't know about that.
811485875.english: Is there a limit to what alchemists can do?

884676406.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
884676406.jp_real: 力は制御できているようだな
884676406.en_literal: Looks like you've got control over your power now.
884676406.english: Seems you're in firm control of your power now.

469010804.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
469010804.jp_real: フラメクの力、正しく扱わなければ
469010804.en_literal: The power of Flamewalk... must be used correctly.

587788753.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
587788753.jp_real: 転生剣王の異名はダテではないということか
587788753.en_literal: So the title of the Heavenly Sword King isn't just a facade, then?
587788753.english: Guess you did earn your title as the Star-Sword Sovereign.

40944497.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
40944497.jp_real: 鋭い狙いだ。まったくブレがない。
40944497.en_literal: Sharp aim. No waver at all.
40944497.english: It's your consistency that amazes me.

975415566.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
975415566.jp_real: ずいぶんと無鉄砲な振る舞いだ
975415566.english: This man doesn't know the word prudence.

1027442711.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
1027442711.jp_real: 作戦通りだ。次も行くぞ。
1027442711.en_literal: It's going according to plan. Let's go for the next one!
1027442711.english: Good. You stuck to the plan.

516883650.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0000
516883650.jp_real: まだ出力は抑えているんだがな。
516883650.en_literal: I'm still holding back my output.
516883650.english: I have to limit its output, actually.

1033297688.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
1033297688.en_literal: But the enemy is still very much alive.
1033297688.english: Come, we still have foes to contend with.

13348569.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
13348569.jp_real: まだ油断はできないぞ、ラカム。
13348569.en_literal: I can't afford to be careless yet, Rackam.
13348569.english: Best not to jump the gun, Rackam.

135148612.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
135148612.jp_real: 考えたこともなかったが
135148612.english: I've actually never thought about it.

294226965.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
294226965.jp_real: そんな感想を抱いたことはないが
294226965.en_literal: I've never felt such a sensation.
294226965.english: Can't say I've ever thought that.

783937126.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
783937126.jp_real: 何かを分からんが、まだ終わっていないぞ。
783937126.en_literal: I don't know what's going on, but it's not over yet.
783937126.english: Poetry can wait. This battle isn't over.

357893674.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
357893674.jp_real: そういうなら、了解した。
357893674.en_literal: If you say so... I understand.

788068728.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
788068728.jp_real: 静寂が訪れてくれるといいが
788068728.english: A quiet nod would've been plenty.

274984441.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
274984441.jp_real: 一匹たりとも逃がしはしない
274984441.en_literal: I won't let either of them get away.
274984441.english: I won't let a single foe go unchecked!

259031341.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
259031341.jp_real: 恐れることはない。敵だけを貫け。
259031341.en_literal: There's nothing to fear. We'll just push through the enemies.

651886237.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
651886237.jp_real: 無闇に近づかないことだ
651886237.en_literal: I won't let you get close to boredom.
651886237.english: Steer clear, or you'll get caught in the crossfire!

892816093.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
892816093.jp_real: フラメクから逃れる術はない
892816093.en_literal: There's no way to escape from the pyramid.
892816093.english: Flamek is not to be trifled with.

603632896.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
603632896.jp_real: もっとポテンシャルを引き出せれば
603632896.en_literal: If I can draw out more potential...
603632896.english: And yet, it still hasn't reached its full potential.

820881101.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
820881101.jp_real: では、その言葉に甘えるとしよう。
820881101.en_literal: Then I'll indulge that word of yours.

407081010.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
407081010.english: Then don't get so close next time.

358641392.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
358641392.jp_real: お前あの力と比べれば驚くものでもないだろ
358641392.en_literal: Compared to your power, it's nothing to be surprised about.
358641392.english: Well, you wield the power of a dragon god.

284793954.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
284793954.jp_real: ふん。天使ですらこれを恐れるのか。
284793954.english: I thought the Supreme Primarch was all-knowing.

18907920.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
18907920.jp_real: 感想を言っている場合か
18907920.en_literal: You're talking about the dryness, huh?

294521358.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
294521358.jp_real: 目をやられんように注意してくれ
294521358.en_literal: Be careful not to get your eyes burned.
294521358.english: Oh, right. Sensitive eyes should look away.

790430692.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
790430692.en_literal: Don't let your guard down yet.
790430692.english: Next time, aim for their vitals.

435802240.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_water_1
435802240.jp_real: ブルー デトネーション！

501927032.label: PL2700_vo_SP_burst_wind_1
501927032.jp_real: エアロテトナエーション！

171116560.label: PL2700_vo_SP_charge_name_1
171116560.jp_real: デッドエンドシュート！

1033717660.label: PL2700_vo_SP_charge_speak_1
1033717660.jp_real: フラメクのイカズチを、フンのオサケベ！

890678839.label: PL2700_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
890678839.jp_real: フラメクのイカズチを、蒼天を焦がせ！

538989390.label: PL2700_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL1200
538989390.jp_real: シャルロッテ、先発で行こう！

271468150.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
271468150.jp_real: 聖晶獣フラカーン！フラメクの攻撃は通るよ！
271468150.en_literal: Play with Fire, Slow Kill, Never Surrender, Heaven Comes Down, Acidrage Howl, Fast Lane, Forever Yours, Flamek Thunder
271468150.english: Just another primal. Flametech should prove effective.

920080298.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
920080298.en_literal: I won't let you have your way.

527057233.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
527057233.jp_real: あきらめがわるい奴だな
527057233.english: Even a dog knows when it's down.

381180995.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
381180995.jp_real: こいつ、ただものではない
381180995.english: Are all of Avia's generals this unhinged?

36352841.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
36352841.jp_real: この程度の障害は想定のうちだ。
36352841.en_literal: Obstacles of this level were expected.
36352841.english: A setback, but not above our pay grade.

538838244.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
538838244.jp_real: 包囲されたが、落ち着いて対処すれば問題ない
538838244.en_literal: Surrounded, but if we stay calm, we'll be fine.
538838244.english: Stay calm. They have the numbers, but we have the skill.

465327534.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
465327534.jp_real: 攻撃を一点に集中させ突破するぞ！
465327534.en_literal: I'll focus my attack on one point and break through!
465327534.english: Focus fire! And pierce through her guard!

813121893.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
813121893.jp_real: 攻防一体の魔剣というわけか
813121893.en_literal: So this is the "Sword and Shield" technique, huh?
813121893.english: With swords like those, who needs shields?

711727804.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
711727804.english: There's gotta be a way to bring it down!

581615332.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
581615332.en_literal: So this is where the weakness is.

578762617.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
578762617.english: Put the heat on those cores!

1044459376.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
1044459376.jp_real: そろそろ静かにしてもらう
1044459376.english: Time for some peace and quiet.

479525425.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
479525425.jp_real: それなりに耐久性はあるようだ

892832029.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
892832029.jp_real: もうはや話は通じないようだな
892832029.en_literal: It seems we can no longer communicate.
892832029.english: At this point, negotiation isn't an option.

594490682.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
594490682.jp_real: おまえの動きは予測済みだ
594490682.english: I've seen your tricks enough times.

464232329.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
464232329.jp_real: 以前のようにはならん

810862281.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
810862281.en_literal: I'll make it easy for you.

618775991.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
618775991.jp_real: 勝てない相手ではない
618775991.en_literal: I'm not an opponent you can't beat.
618775991.english: It doesn't matter what he's become. He still bleeds.

577885788.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
577885788.jp_real: カッキングをしてもらうぞ
577885788.en_literal: I'll have you do the honours.

1002028763.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
1002028763.en_literal: Something... I have a bad feeling about this.
1002028763.english: I don't like the look of this.

834134229.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
834134229.jp_real: 心を見出すような風だ
834134229.en_literal: A wind that stirs the heart.

697746212.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
697746212.jp_real: あの時のフラカーンより凶暴だな
697746212.en_literal: That's more ferocious than the Flak Cannon from back then.

225307753.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
225307753.jp_real: とにかく、目の前の敵に集中する！
225307753.en_literal: Anyway, I'll focus on the enemy in front of me.
225307753.english: Stay on the enemy. No funny business.

439965264.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
439965264.en_literal: What on earth is his true intention?

529535464.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
529535464.jp_real: この動きは予習済みだ
529535464.english: I've seen your tricks before, Wolf!

367568053.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
367568053.english: I didn't need all this noise.

520763255.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
520763255.english: Ten to one, that fire's deadly!

700592337.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
700592337.en_literal: I'll take care of the alert.

512238547.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
512238547.jp_real: ソラニヘイオントセイジャクヲ
512238547.en_literal: Peace and silence to the sky.
512238547.english: I'll bring peace and quiet back to the skies.

464292780.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
464292780.jp_real: これ以上スキにはさせん!
464292780.en_literal: I won't let you have this anymore!

721568766.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
721568766.en_literal: I'm sorry, but I can't provide the requested translation.

870110907.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
870110907.en_literal: This is the power of bonds!

728105960.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
728105960.jp_real: 相手が神だろうが関係ない
728105960.en_literal: It doesn't matter if the opponent is a god.
728105960.english: God or not, I'll save these skies!

645564744.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
645564744.jp_real: 無謀だとしても、やるしかない
645564744.en_literal: Even if it's hopeless, I have no choice but to do it.
645564744.english: Didn't see this coming, but I won't back down!

263234143.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_9st_1_FIRST
263234143.jp_real: イドの影…なのか。油断はできない。
263234143.en_literal: The shadow of Id... Could it be? We can't afford to be careless.
263234143.english: A shadow Eid? Doesn't bode well.

190670661.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_C
190670661.en_literal: Now then... what shall we do?

179186951.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
179186951.jp_real: ちっ、無効化されている

759554875.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
759554875.en_literal: I'll go ahead and rush forward!

943370869.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
943370869.en_literal: I'll clear them all at once!

110290439.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
110290439.jp_real: これより聖堂へ向かう
110290439.en_literal: I'm heading to the Holy Road from here.

471148422.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
471148422.jp_real: イストリエスの護衛を優先するぞ！

250219995.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
250219995.english: We have to locate the catalyst.

668041027.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
668041027.jp_real: ルリアのために、全力を尽くすぞ！
668041027.en_literal: I'll give it my all for Lyria.
668041027.english: Don't hold back! Lyria needs us!

671514928.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
671514928.jp_real: 先を急がなければいけない
671514928.english: We can't afford to waste time!

706914166.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
706914166.jp_real: この島、何かありそうだな。
706914166.en_literal: This island... seems like it might have something to offer.

495498630.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
495498630.jp_real: どこに潜んでいるかわからん。慎重に進むぞ。
495498630.en_literal: I don't know where they're hiding. Let's move carefully.
495498630.english: Stay sharp. Enemies could be around any corner.

911900358.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
911900358.jp_real: 野手にしては脇が甘い
911900358.en_literal: You're too soft for a beast.
911900358.english: For a raid, they're light on personnel.

624309705.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
624309705.en_literal: There's no other way but to move forward.

971638790.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
971638790.en_literal: What on earth is this tower?

175519393.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
175519393.jp_real: 邪魔する輩は排除する

1013008805.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
1013008805.jp_real: みんなの力がこれほどとは
1013008805.en_literal: I never thought your power could reach this level.

773634636.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
773634636.jp_real: みんないい連携だった

567163691.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
567163691.en_literal: If that's the case... I can do it.

1023475299.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
1023475299.en_literal: Everyone, don't let your guard down.

658059651.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
658059651.en_literal: Don't miss your chance to attack.

630811284.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
630811284.jp_real: 次はもう少し精度を上げる
630811284.en_literal: Next time, I'll raise the accuracy a bit more.

386049585.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
386049585.en_literal: Then, let's prepare for the next one.

830483939.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
830483939.en_literal: So this is the power of the people of the stars?
830483939.english: Astral power is on another level!

953472237.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
953472237.jp_real: いい腕をしているな、ラカム。

274655280.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
274655280.jp_real: ロゼッタ、なるべく離れてくれ
274655280.en_literal: Rosetta, please stay as far away as you can.

730079589.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
730079589.jp_real: 次は奇襲をかける！行けるか？
730079589.en_literal: I'll lay down the foundation. Can you handle it?

1060149990.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
1060149990.jp_real: 次も頼むぞ、シャルロッテ。
1060149990.en_literal: I'm counting on you again, Charlotta.

967652442.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
967652442.jp_real: まさか…稲妻の間隙を縫って切り結んだのか…
967652442.en_literal: No way... You actually cut through the lightning barrage?
967652442.english: He sliced through our target while zigzagging between my lightning!

671211520.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
671211520.english: I may never reach your level.

339736689.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
339736689.jp_real: 力のセーブの仕方は参考になる
339736689.en_literal: Your way of preserving power is quite instructive.
339736689.english: So that's how you save your reserves.

171735335.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
171735335.jp_real: 剣だけでなく拳も使うのか
171735335.en_literal: So you fight with fists as well as swords?
171735335.english: So you know how to throw a punch too!

247497460.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
247497460.jp_real: シエテ、手を抜いていないだろうな
247497460.en_literal: Seofon, you haven't pulled your punches, have you?
247497460.english: I trust you're taking this seriously.

196231276.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
196231276.english: If you ever need cover, call for me.

305392304.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
305392304.en_literal: You're quite the sight to wake up to.

535494745.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
535494745.jp_real: 敵を引きつけすぎるなよ
535494745.en_literal: Don't draw too much attention to the enemy.
535494745.english: Don't draw too much enemy fire.

370396016.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
370396016.en_literal: I'll prepare for the next enemy.
370396016.english: Get ready for the next foe!

1033935768.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
1033935768.jp_real: 銃の手入れが行き届いているな。銃声でわかる。
1033935768.en_literal: Your marksmanship is impressive. I can tell by the accuracy.
1033935768.english: My ears tell me your guns are well maintained.

698811899.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
698811899.jp_real: あまり前に出すぎるなよ

1046939792.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
1046939792.jp_real: よく合わせてくれたな

390735010.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
390735010.en_literal: I see. So this is Hakryu.
390735010.english: The white dragons are a formidable faction.

352981521.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
352981521.jp_real: 過言は無用だぞ、パーシヴァル。
352981521.en_literal: No need to hold back, Percival.

151429963.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
151429963.jp_real: もう少し上手く立ち回れたか？
151429963.en_literal: Could you have handled yourself a little better?
151429963.english: I know I can do better than that.

625757117.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
625757117.jp_real: 瞑想をしている時とはまるで別人だな。
625757117.en_literal: You're like a completely different person from when you're meditating.
625757117.english: You're intense when you aren't meditating.

736128321.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
736128321.jp_real: その拳自体が武器というわけか
736128321.en_literal: So your fists themselves are your weapons?
736128321.english: Maybe I should revisit hand-to-hand training.

55893598.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
55893598.en_literal: I relied too much on brute force.
55893598.english: Can't rely on brute force alone.

922599042.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
922599042.jp_real: 土塊が稲妻を遮断しないといいが
922599042.en_literal: I hope that bastard doesn't block my lightning.
922599042.english: I hope your dirt clumps don't block my lightning.

211446017.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
211446017.en_literal: I'll leave the front line to you.

474338308.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
474338308.jp_real: 迷いのない一撃だった
474338308.en_literal: It was a strike without hesitation.

740421356.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
740421356.jp_real: そろそろ本気を出したらどうなんだ
740421356.en_literal: How about we finally bring it on?
740421356.english: Maybe I should step it up.

655372427.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
655372427.jp_real: もう少し静かに戦ってくれ
655372427.en_literal: Just a little more... fight quietly.
655372427.english: Can you keep it down just a little?

691189277.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
691189277.en_literal: Alright, let's prepare for the next one.
691189277.english: Good. Get ready for the next.

132693143.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
132693143.jp_real: 陣形を崩すなよ、ベアトリクス。

670246355.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
670246355.jp_real: 少しでもおかしな動きをしたら、撃つ。
670246355.en_literal: If you so much as twitch... I'll shoot.
670246355.english: If I even think you're up to no good...

165782015.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0000
165782015.jp_real: あまり無茶はするなよ

389382349.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
389382349.jp_real: フラメクに焼かれるぞ！下がっていろ！
389382349.en_literal: I'll burn you with Flamek! Get out of the way!
389382349.english: Step back! Flamme is ready to howl!

22915758.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
22915758.jp_real: ランスロットほどの双剣の使い手はそういないだろうな。
22915758.en_literal: There's probably no one else who can wield a sword like Lancelot.
22915758.english: No one in the sky realm wields twin blades like you!

102742021.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
102742021.jp_real: 次の標的に移るぞ、ヴェイン。
102742021.en_literal: Let's move on to the next target, Vane.

644562878.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
644562878.jp_real: まだ油断はできないか
644562878.en_literal: I still can't let my guard down.

327520077.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
327520077.jp_real: さっき読みして踏み込むとはな。
327520077.en_literal: You're really going all in, huh?
327520077.english: You read their movements like a book.

397865924.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
397865924.jp_real: タイミングが完璧だな

528970110.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
528970110.jp_real: 空気を裂くような鋭い一閃だ
528970110.en_literal: A sharp one-liner that cuts through the air.
528970110.english: It's like your blade cuts the storm itself.

610286858.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
610286858.english: You're an asset to any team.

169872752.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
169872752.jp_real: 次のターゲットに移るぞ
169872752.en_literal: Moving on to the next target.

500265147.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
500265147.jp_real: 次のターゲットに移るぞ
500265147.en_literal: Moving on to the next target.

911985164.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
911985164.jp_real: おどけたふりして、ずいぶんと的確に射線の確保する
911985164.en_literal: Pretending to be clueless, I'm securing the line of fire with great accuracy.
911985164.english: Despite your antics, I was still able to keep a bead on the target.

637804420.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
637804420.jp_real: 次もこの調子で攻めろ！
637804420.en_literal: Let's keep up this momentum and press the attack!

210825644.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
210825644.en_literal: So this is the power of an angel...
210825644.english: This is the power of an angel.

587943699.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
587943699.jp_real: 暑苦しいな。槍戦士ってやつは。
587943699.en_literal: It's so hot... You're a spear fighter, huh?
587943699.english: You certainly are a heated warrior.

169215877.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
169215877.jp_real: 平穏と静寂は、いまだ訪れやしない
169215877.en_literal: Peace and silence still haven't arrived.
169215877.english: We're still a far cry away from true peace and quiet.

727648935.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
727648935.jp_real: 次のターゲットに移るぞ
727648935.en_literal: Moving on to the next target.

415429426.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
415429426.jp_real: 六竜か…真意が掴めんな
415429426.en_literal: Six dragons? I can't grasp their true intentions.
415429426.english: So, what are the six dragons plotting?

543660194.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
543660194.jp_real: 引き続き後方から支援する
543660194.en_literal: I'll continue to support from the rear.

62291086.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
62291086.jp_real: 役割をこなしただけだ
62291086.english: Support fire is what I do.

751591395.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
751591395.jp_real: ラカム、お前も随分と元気そうだな。

879590820.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
879590820.en_literal: So you're the one who's been causing all this trouble.

267920404.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
267920404.jp_real: 戦況に合わせ動いているだけだ
267920404.en_literal: I'm just moving in accordance with the tide of battle.

1050986922.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
1050986922.jp_real: 追撃でカバーしただけだ
1050986922.en_literal: I only covered you with a follow-up.

795228767.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
795228767.jp_real: 引き続き後方から支援する
795228767.en_literal: I'll continue supporting from the rear.
795228767.english: My next shots won't miss either.

263782855.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
263782855.jp_real: 拳の美をここまで極めるとは
263782855.en_literal: To refine the power of fists to this extent...
263782855.english: I guess there's a first for everything.

643033893.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
643033893.en_literal: Yeah. Prepare for what comes next.

669059132.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
669059132.jp_real: それが俺の戦う理由だ

921755852.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
921755852.jp_real: ラカムとオイゲンはどうなる？
921755852.english: Rackam and Eugen are more than loud enough.

92686724.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
92686724.en_literal: I'm more than ready for this.
92686724.english: What do you think I've been doing?

387154626.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
387154626.jp_real: 追撃を無駄にするなよ

517089760.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
517089760.en_literal: I'll let you rely on me.

839947244.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
839947244.jp_real: 機密に抵触する。ノーコメントだ。
839947244.en_literal: I'll keep it secret. No comment.
839947244.english: I can neither confirm nor deny.

332532418.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0000
332532418.jp_real: 団長は前だけ見ていればいい
332532418.en_literal: The leader just needs to look forward.
332532418.english: I won't let anyone get the jump on you.

334658819.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
334658819.en_literal: You put up a good fight.

880649823.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
880649823.en_literal: I'm in the middle of a battle!

569175505.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
569175505.jp_real: アドリブにしてはうまくいったか？
569175505.en_literal: Did that ad-lib work out for you?
569175505.english: Not bad for an improvised attack.

272197699.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
272197699.jp_real: ペットたちに怪我はないか？
272197699.english: Or any of your pets injured?

556003156.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
556003156.en_literal: No problem. Prepare for the next one.

748946070.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
748946070.jp_real: これくらいは造作もない
748946070.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this!

336288653.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
336288653.jp_real: ユーステス：敵の行動パターンは掴んだ
336288653.english: It was easy to predict their movement.

437961953.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
437961953.jp_real: セジオ行ってどうする？
437961953.en_literal: What are you going to do with the information?

492842093.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
492842093.en_literal: Then get out of my way.

583349551.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
583349551.jp_real: 次のターゲットに備えろ

820851314.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
820851314.english: Hard to compare to an eternal.

479070674.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
479070674.en_literal: Let's show them what we can do together.
479070674.english: Sure. Point me to the next target.

1025320130.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
1025320130.jp_real: おおよそ三手先までは予測済みだ
1025320130.en_literal: I've got a rough idea of what's coming up.
1025320130.english: Nope, I'm always three moves ahead.

493869993.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
493869993.jp_real: ああ、言われるまでもない
493869993.en_literal: No need to tell me that.

221322179.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0000
221322179.jp_real: ああ、思う存分暴れてこい
221322179.en_literal: Ah, go wild as you please.

90671773.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
90671773.jp_real: グローブで保護しているので問題はない
90671773.en_literal: I'm protected by my gloves, so there's no problem.

918190428.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
918190428.jp_real: ああ、立ち上がる限りな

262945558.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
262945558.jp_real: 戦闘に集中しろ、ヴェイン。

418049273.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
418049273.jp_real: フラメクの出力が強すぎたか。

496300028.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
496300028.english: Kind of you to ask, but no.

136475449.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
136475449.jp_real: 冗談を言っている場合か
136475449.en_literal: Are you kidding me right now?

46797184.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
46797184.en_literal: You don't say much, do you?
46797184.english: When the mission calls for it.

488498306.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
488498306.jp_real: バザラガと違ってやりづらいな
488498306.en_literal: Unlike Vaseraga, this one's a pain to deal with.
488498306.english: Would rather be working with Vaseraga right now.

293629841.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
293629841.jp_real: ユーステス：ツメガアマイゾ

280443322.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
280443322.jp_real: いや、悪くない連携だった
280443322.en_literal: No, it wasn't a bad link.

996643828.label: PL2700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
996643828.english: Hey, don't get hit on purpose!
